summary: Tested Invoice and Return pages rewrite - Sales/Purchase Invoices completely rewritten, Print functionality added to Sales/Purchase Returns. All 17 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend UI tests confirmed all features working correctly.

issues: React hydration warning: <tr> cannot be child of <span> in tbody - not blocking functionality

seed_data_creation: Used existing test returns (SR-2026-00001, PR-2026-00001) for UI testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Invoice and Return pages completely rewritten and tested. All features working.
